subscriptions.title: Event Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Manage your event notification preferences
subscriptions.noSubscriptionsDescription: Create your first subscription to get notified about events that match your interests
subscriptions.createDescription: Get notified about events that match your interests
subscriptions.enterPrompt: Please enter a prompt for your subscription
subscriptions.subscriptionTypeDescription: Choose whether to get notified about specific types of events or all events
subscriptions.allEventsWarning: You'll receive notifications for all future events. This can result in many emails.
subscriptions.promptQuestion: What kind of events are you interested in?
subscriptions.promptPlaceholder: e.g., AI and machine learning conferences, startup networking events, tech talks about web development...
subscriptions.promptDescription: Describe the types of events you'd like to be notified about. Be as specific or general as you'd like.
subscriptions.notFoundDescription: The subscription you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.
subscriptions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this subscription?
subscriptions.detailsDescription: Manage your subscription settings and view pending events
subscriptions.noPendingDescription: Events matching your subscription will appear here
subscriptions.previewDescription: Here's a sample of events that match your description (with match scores):
subscriptions.noEventsFound: No events found matching this description
subscriptions.tryAdjusting: Try adjusting your prompt or check back later for new events
subscriptions.belowThreshold: Below relevance threshold - won't trigger notifications ({{count}})
subscriptions.foundRelevant: Found {{count}} relevant events that will trigger notifications.
subscriptions.additionalEvents: {{count}} additional events are shown but fall below the relevance threshold.
